name: Stock Market Dashboard
tagline: Interactive QQQ & SPY dashboard with technical indicators — Bollinger Bands, RSI, and SMA — built in one prompt.
description: A dark-themed stock market dashboard for QQQ and SPY ETFs. Includes interactive Chart.js price charts with SMA (20/100/200-day), Bollinger Bands, and RSI indicators. Shows metric cards for current price, day/week/month/YTD performance, 52-week high/low, and annualised volatility. Tab-based navigation between ETFs, time-range filtering (3M/6M/1Y/ALL), and a glass-morphism UI. Data is hardcoded — no live API calls required.

prompt.text: Build a stock market dashboard for QQQ and SPY ETFs. Show historical price charts with technical indicators: SMA (20-day, 100-day, 200-day), Bollinger Bands (20-period, 2 std dev), and RSI (14-period). Include metric cards showing current price, day change, week change, month change, YTD performance, 52-week high/low, and annualised volatility. Add time-range filtering (3M, 6M, 1Y, ALL) and tab-based navigation between the two ETFs. Use Chart.js for the charts, Tailwind CSS for styling, and a dark glass-morphism UI. Use hardcoded historical closing price data — no live API calls.

worked: Complete dark glass-morphism UI with correct Tailwind classes
Chart.js integration with SMA overlays and Bollinger Bands
RSI chart on a separate canvas below the price chart
Metric cards (price, day/week/month/YTD change, 52w high/low, volatility)
Tab switching between QQQ and SPY with reactive chart updates
Time-range filter (3M, 6M, 1Y, ALL) that slices the data correctly
Lit-html reactive rendering without a build step
Responsive layout that works on desktop and mobile

screenshots.alt: Full-page view of the QQQ dashboard with price chart, Bollinger Bands, RSI, and metric cards
